items.title: Ghana seeks 30% of large gold mines’ output for local refineries
items.summary: Africa’s largest bullion producer is seeking an additional 10% on top of the current 20% that large mines must sell to the state-owned Ghana Gold Board.

items.title: Zambia forms gold venture to formalize mining, build processing
items.summary: The new vehicle will operate in a part of North-Western Province that was the site of a disorderly gold rush that began last year.

items.title: Russia fails to sell stake in gold miner UGC as no one bids at auction
items.summary: The 67.2% stake in UGC - one of Russia's top 10 gold miners - was valued at 140.43 billion roubles.

items.title: Ghana seeks to buy 30% of gold from miners to boost reserves, central bank
items.summary: The government revamped the gold purchase program in February, targeting up to 157 tons (15 months of import cover) by 2028.

items.title: China’s biggest courier is set to open gold vault in Hong Kong
items.summary: SF Holding Co. is planning to open the custodian vault within its complex near the airport in October.

items.title: Gold price falls back to $4,500 on heightened inflation fears
items.summary: The market is now pricing in a more than 50% chance of a rate hike next January, according to Kalshi.

items.title: Larvotto Resources reports recoverable antimony, gold from tailings at Hillgrove
items.summary: Initial flotation testwork on TSF1 tailings achieved 80–95% antimony and 40–75% gold recoveries, the company said.

items.title: US gold firm taps mining veteran Warke for Venezuela project
items.summary: Venezuela seized the Siembra Minera mining project from Gold Reserve in 2008 under former President Hugo Chávez.

items.title: India caps duty-free gold imports for jewellery exporters to curb demand
items.summary: India exports gold jewellery widely, allowing duty-free gold imports for manufacturers under the advance authorization scheme.

items.title: Hemlo hits 16g gold at namesake Ontario mine
items.summary: Hemlo is about one-fifth of the way through a 130,000-metre exploration drilling program planned for 2026.

items.title: Gold price steadies as inflation revives higher-rate bets
items.summary: Gold prices consolidate near $4,700/oz as US consumption slows, aligning with market expectations.

items.title: Gold dealer’s owner said to seek up to €500 million in Milan IPO
items.summary: Gens Aurea and its majority owner DVC Partners are considering launching an offering as soon as the coming months.

items.title: Gold discounts in India breach record amid profit-taking
items.summary: The duty hike triggered a sharp rise in local gold prices, prompting some investors to cash in on gains by offloading gold.

items.title: EXPLAINER: Why India’s higher tariffs are unlikely to dent gold, silver demand
items.summary: Demand was also resilient when India raised gold import tariffs to 10% from 2% between 2012 and 2013.

items.title: Equinox, Orla combine to form $18.5B gold miner
items.summary: Equinox Gold’s takeover of Orla Mining would create a North America-focused producer generating 1.1 million oz. a year.

items.title: India raises gold and silver tariffs to 15% to curb imports, support rupee
items.summary: The higher duties could dampen demand in the world's second-largest consumer of precious metals.

items.title: India’s top jeweler expects brief slowdown if gold buying curbed
items.summary: Titan is trying to assess how demand for the precious metal in the world’s second-largest consumer will change.

items.title: Gold Candle acquires Pan American Silver’s Larder property in the Abitibi
items.summary: The property, located 35 km east of Kirkland Lake, adds over 6,400 hectares to Gold Candle’s land package.

items.title: Dateline Resources confirms strong margins for California gold project
items.summary: The project could generate more than $1 billion in undiscounted free cash flows (before tax), a new feasibility study shows.
